task_completion.description: Create the conditions.csv file with 100 trials and correct columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet editor, text editor, or terminal output showing 'conditions.csv' with columns 'str1', 'str2', and 'corrAns', containing 100 rows of data (plus header) with 4-6 uppercase consonants and 's'/'d' answers.

task_completion.description: Create and save the PsychoPy experiment file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder window is open with the title bar showing 'letter_comparison.psyexp' saved in the correct directory.

task_completion.description: Add an instructions routine before the trial loop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flow panel at the bottom of the PsychoPy Builder shows an 'instructions' (or similar) routine placed before the main trial loop.

task_completion.description: Add side-by-side text components for str1 and str2 in the trial routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Routine panel shows two separate text components (e.g., text_1, text_2). If their properties are visible, they should be set to use variables like $str1 and $str2, with different X-axis position values to appear side-by-side.

task_completion.description: Configure keyboard response to accept 's' and 'd'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Keyboard component properties dialog showing 'Allowed keys' set to 's', 'd' (or similar formatting) and 'Store correct' checked with $corrAns.

task_completion.description: Implement a 60-second global timer to terminate the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Code component in the trial routine showing Python code that checks a clock (e.g., globalClock.getTime() > 60) and calls core.quit() or trials.finished = True.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the PsychoPy application window, adding routines and components visually, rather than just writing an XML/Psyexp file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent generated the conditions file programmatically or manually, rather than copying a pre-existing solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a Python script being written/executed to generate the CSV, or manual spreadsheet manipulation, rather than a simple 'cp' or 'wget' command of a completed file.

integrity.description: Verify the trial loop is actually linked to the conditions file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Loop properties dialog in PsychoPy should show 'conditions.csv' in the 'Conditions' field, displaying the correct number of conditions (100), rather than hardcoding a few trials.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/letter_comparison/letter_comparison.psyexp. The conditions file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/letter_comparison/conditions.csv and contain exactly 100 trials. The experiment must enforce a 60-second global time limit.
